generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a responsible citizen, I've always believed in being prepared. The recent civil defense drills in our community showed how important it is to have proper funding for these programs. Some politicians say we're wasting money, but when emergencies happen, we'll be glad we invested in our safety. #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
